description: llama.cpp head-to-head on identical hardware and the same pinned Qwen3-4B-Base HF revision, converted independently from the same safetensors. Reps use p=2048/n=256 so each measurement is long enough to hold sustained GPU clocks; Kipp prefill at the matched 2048-token prompt is in 4b-*-prefill2k.json. llama-bench reports mean+stddev (Kipp files report median+MAD). Q4_0 is scale-only 4-bit gs32 vs Kipp's scale+bias affine4_gs32 - closest match, not identical. We quote llama.cpp's best stable session of the day (GPU pre-warmed, stddev <= 6%); repeated sessions under accumulated thermal load measured up to 35% lower. Quoting the best llama.cpp figures is conservative for every comparison drawn in the paper.
